falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would signal extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving the pattern is a blowoff top rather than a bottom.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NYSE exceeds the 50-day average by 200% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate a confirmed breakout or breakdown, falsifying the 'UNKNOWN' phase by showing clear directional momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
